backend/main.mo: Entry point for the Motoko backend actor that composes blob storage functionality via a MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the mock tailor dataset in mockTailors.ts was expanded to 200+ entries with full area/category coverage, mapped to test ID REQ-10.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and contents of each component, hook, page, and data file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and chart palette.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Silai Ghar React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing screen-level navigation state across Home, Search, TailorProfile, MapView, BookingConfirmation, and Bookings screens using a discriminated union type.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingS: Displays an animated booking confirmation card with a generated booking ID, tailor name, address, service, and formatted date/time.
frontend/src/components/booking/DateTime: Interactive date picker with month navigation calendar grid and a time slot selector, supporting past-date disabling and selected-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/home/CategoryGri: Renders a 3-column grid of category buttons sourced from the CATEGORIES constant, each with an image and label, triggering a category selection callback.
frontend/src/components/home/LocationSel: Dropdown chip component using Radix DropdownMenu to let users select a Mumbai neighborhood from the MUMBAI_AREAS list.
frontend/src/components/home/PromotedTai: Renders a horizontally scrollable carousel of featured tailors with banner images, ratings, and click handlers to view a tailor's profile.
frontend/src/components/home/SearchBar.t: A controlled search input component with a search icon, placeholder text, and callbacks for value changes and focus events.
frontend/src/components/home/ServicesHig: Displays a 2-column grid of four service offerings (pickup/delivery, home consultation, style guidance, custom stitching) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Top-level layout wrapper that renders children inside a mobile-constrained container with a fixed bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Fixed bottom tab bar with Home, Search, Map, and Bookings tabs, highlighting the active tab with primary color and a dot indicator.
frontend/src/components/map/TailorPinMar: Renders a positioned map pin button for a tailor showing their price range, with visual scaling to indicate selected state.
frontend/src/components/map/TailorPrevie: A slide-up card showing a tailor's thumbnail, rating, and location with a button to navigate to their full profile.
frontend/src/components/search/FilterPan: A bottom-sheet filter panel allowing users to filter tailors by location, budget range, style, delivery, and home consultation options.
frontend/src/components/search/TailorCar: A list card component displaying a tailor's photo, name, star rating, address, distance, phone, and service badges.
frontend/src/components/tailor/Portfolio: Renders a horizontally scrollable row of portfolio images for a given tailor.
frontend/src/data/mockTailors.ts: Defines the Tailor TypeScript interface and exports mock data including a list of Mumbai-area tailors, service categories, and area names used throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file indicating that all data is served from mock data hooks and no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/hooks/useTailorById.ts: Hook that looks up and returns a single tailor from the mock data by ID using memoization.
frontend/src/hooks/useTailors.ts: Hook that filters and returns tailors from mock data based on optional criteria including location, budget range, delivery, home consultation, category, and search query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a warm cream/beige/maroon design token palette along with utility classes for scrollbar hiding and mobile layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmation.t: Page component for booking an appointment with a tailor, allowing the user to select a date/time and add instructions, then showing a success message upon confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Bookings.tsx: Page component displaying the user's bookings list, currently showing an empty state with instructions on how the booking flow works.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring the app header with location selector and search bar, a promoted tailors carousel, category grid, and services highlight section.
frontend/src/pages/MapView.tsx: Renders a stylized SVG map of Mumbai's Andheri–Bandra corridor with clickable tailor pin markers and a preview card for the selected tailor, plus header controls to switch back to list view.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResults.tsx: Displays a filterable, scrollable list of tailor cards based on category or search query, with a filter panel drawer, active filter chips, and a toggle to switch to map view.
frontend/src/pages/TailorProfile.tsx: Shows a detailed profile page for a single tailor including hero image, rating, address, phone, services, portfolio gallery, and a booking consultation button.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a warm custom color palette (cream, beige, brown, maroon) using oklch variables, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), extended border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for Silai Ghar, a Mumbai hyperlocal tailor discovery app, including architectural notes, implemented feature IDs, and versioning metadata.
